en.ahmedali: And plunged into useless things with those who were obstinate,
en.ahmedraza: “And used to dwell on evil matters with those who think evilly.”
en.arberry: and we plunged along with the plungers,
en.daryabadi: And we have been wading with the waders.
en.hilali: "And we used to talk falsehood (all that which Allah hated) with vain talkers.
en.itani: And we used to indulge with those who indulge.
en.maududi: and we indulged in vain talk with those who indulged in vain talk,
en.mubarakpuri: "And we used to speak falsehood with vain speakers."
en.pickthall: We used to wade (in vain dispute) with (all) waders,
en.qarai: We used to indulge in [profane] gossip along with the gossipers,
en.qaribullah: We plunged in with the plungers
en.sahih: And we used to enter into vain discourse with those who engaged [in it],
en.sarwar: We indulged and persisted in useless disputes,
en.shakir: And we used to enter into vain discourse with those who entered into vain discourses.
en.wahiduddin: we indulged in vain arguments along with those who indulged in them;
en.yusufali: "But we used to talk vanities with vain talkers;
fa.ansarian: و با فرورفتگان [در گفتار و کردار باطل] فرومی رفتیم،
fa.ayati: و با آنان كه سخن باطل مى‌گفتند هماواز مى‌شديم،
fa.bahrampour: و با آنها كه باطل مى‌بافتند هم آواز مى‌شديم
fa.ghomshei: و ما با اهل باطل به بطالت می‌پرداختیم.
fa.khorramdel: و ما پیوسته با باطلگرایان (هم‌نشین و هم‌صدا می‌شده‌ایم و به باطل و یاوه و عیبجوئی) فرو می‌رفته‌ایم. [[«نَخُوضُ»: به هرگونه باطلی فرو می‌رفتیم و در استهزاء و سخریّه حق و حقیقت شرکت می‌کردیم (نگا: نساء / 140، انعام / 68، توبه / 65 و 69).]]
fa.makarem: و پیوسته با اهل باطل همنشین و همصدا بودیم،
fa.moezzi: و بودیم فرو می‌رفتیم با فروروندگان‌
